---
title: "Computational Musicology 2026"
author: "Lance Moody"
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
---

# Chromagrams of favorite songs:

## Column {width="40%"}

### Row {height="30%"}

::: card
This will be the first page of my portfolio!
:::

### Row {height="70%"}

::: card
Second card babyyy!!! ![](voor_alles_bang_timbre_ssm.png)
:::

## Column {width="60%"}

::: card
Second column!!!!!!
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------
